description: Your executive's address book is cluttered with duplicate and outdated entries for a key stakeholder, Robert Chen. Consolidate all contacts related to Robert Chen (or Bob Chen) into a single master record. The final contact must have the following details: First Name: Robert, Last Name: Chen, Display Name: Robert Chen, Primary Email: robert.chen@apexfinancial.com, Secondary Email: rchen99@gmail.com, Organization: Apex Financial, and Work Phone: 555-0198. Delete all obsolete duplicate entries so that only this single accurate record remains in the Thunderbird Address Book.
